Improve resume by rewriting it in a professional tone.  
Mallott’s General Store Office Assistant & Bookkeeper  
• Track and record deposited checks and sale transaction revenue through the POS system and business’ financial banking account.  
• Provide monthly billing invoices for clientele personal expenses  
• Cash personal/business checks, send and receive money for customers, i.e. MoneyGram  
• Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages and register reports with Quickbooks & 21st Century Accounting  
• Receive and answer calls from customers needing assistance for various business-related matters and issues.
